title: Midnight gamepad (controller support)
description: Now you can play miencraft java edition with your controller
body:
**This is a pre-alpha version of the mod. Features are incomplete and may change over time.**

**THIS IS NOT A FORK OF MIDNIGHT CONTROLS**
# What it does?:
This mod adds controller support to Minecraft Java Edition, allowing players to play the game using a gamepad instead of a keyboard and mouse.

## Current features include:
- Basic controller support for gameplay 🎮
- Controller vibration (rumble) based on in-game actions
- Virtual on-screen keyboard for chat input without using a physical keyboard

The goal of this mod is to provide a more immersive and comfortable experience for players who prefer using controllers.

## **Please note:**
- This is an early pre-alpha release
- Some features may be unfinished or unstable
- The interface (such as the virtual keyboard) is still being improved

More features and improvements will be added in future updates.
